description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the node:8.9.4 Docker image and defines two stages: build and package. Add a build job (stage: build) that runs the command `node ./update-ws.js` and publishes the entire repository (./) as an artifact that expires after 1 day. Add a mirrors-repo job (stage: package) that depends on the build job, runs `tar -czvf mirrors.tar.gz websites.json mirrors/*`, and stores the generated mirrors.tar.gz as an artifact that expires after 1 week.
